contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: More compact than West Indian lemongrass — better suited to large pots.

notes: More lemony and less citrusy than West Indian lemongrass (WSL-0061). Used in Ayurvedic medicine and Indian cooking. Slightly more compact growth habit. Both varieties used interchangeably in Southeast Asian cooking.
